title: Lightning Invoice API Handler Config
description: Configuration for the com.musqet.invoice-api payment handler. The Business advertises a Provider-hosted HTTP endpoint that issues BOLT11 invoices; the Platform POSTs to it to obtain an invoice. Verification happens between Business and Provider and is not agent-visible.

merchant_id.description: Public Business identifier at the Invoice Provider. NOT a secret.

invoice_endpoint.description: Provider HTTPS endpoint for BOLT11 invoice creation. Called by the Platform during Acquisition. MUST use https.

display_name.description: Optional human-readable label for payment-method UI.

supported_currencies.description: Currency codes the Provider accepts for this Business (e.g., SAT, USD, EUR, GBP). When omitted, platforms SHOULD assume only SAT is supported.
